text: Hearing the familiar invocation—a ritual phrase—echo in an unexpected, modern setting fills me with an odd sense of solemnity mixed with displacement. The world around me is bright, artificial, and meticulously ordered, a space dedicated to research and development, yet someone has brought a sacred utterance into it. I feel both respecting of the gesture and curious about its place here. There is a silent tension between tradition and innovation, faith and intellect. I am intrigued and contemplative, sensing that here, the search for meaning takes on new, unexpected forms.
